about.headline: Bringing characters to life.
bioParagraphs: Mickey Farmer is an actor based in Oklahoma City, OK. Film training at OFA Studios (Oklahoma City); theater at Booker T. Washington High School for the Performing and Visual Arts; voice acting with Double AA Media (Aaron Michael) and Real Voice LA.
A fearless approach to character—Mickey goes there. Loves ad-lib, comedy, horror, and drama, and brings that same commitment to every set and every collaboration.
about.productionNote: Mickey is fully cleared for all visible tattoos. A Master Release (including irrevocable media appearance rights and waiver of droit moral) is available immediately upon request.

rows.synopsis: A teenage vampire crushes on the local barista while two vampire hunters attempt to break up their date.
A millennial manager struggles to find the most effective means to communicate with his gen-z team.
Blake and Celeste learn how the other lives after switching places for a day.

rows.director: dir. Nick Hodge, High Five Media
rows.synopsis: In a future where birth rates have collapsed, matched partners Carson and Sophia are placed in a room and given a pill meant to compel them to conceive. They choose not to take it.

rows.project: The Parents Guide to Satanic Cults
rows.synopsis: A short film exploring parental fears and the satanic panic era.

rows.project: Percy Jackson and the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
rows.synopsis: Zeus's lightning bolt is stolen and demigod Percy Jackson is accused. He must find the real thief and return the bolt before war breaks out among the Olympians.
1962 Baltimore. Plus-sized teen Tracy Turnblad wins a spot on a TV dance show and fights to integrate it.
The classic fairy tale: a young woman in servitude is transformed by her fairy godmother and wins the prince's heart.
1959 Rydell High. Danny and Sandy navigate peer pressure and identity to find their way back together.
The Greek myth of the god of the underworld and the goddess of spring.
